title: equisetum limosum f. minus
intro: Equisetum limosum f. minus, also known as dwarf horsetail, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Equisetum limosum f. minus include treating urinary tract issues, reducing inflammation, and improving respiratory problems, as well as supporting kidney function and promoting detoxification. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
